hooks.command: count=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '(wiki/|raw/research/weekly-)'); if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then branch=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); printf '{"systemMessage":"⚠ %s uncommitted weekly-brief files on %s — run git status to inspect"}\n' "$count" "$branch"; fi
